# terrible_community_proxmox_proxmox_pool (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `poolid` (String) The pool ID.

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Specify the description for the pool. Parameter is ignored when pool already exists or `state=absent`.
- `state` (String) Indicate desired state of the pool. The pool must be empty prior deleting it with `state=absent`.

### Read-Only

- `msg` (String) A short message on what the module did.
